mof2text: C44H48N4O40Y4 has unit-cell lengths of 8.9348 Å, 9.6608 Å, and 17.017 Å with cell angles of 90.0°, 102.8°, and 90.0°, and crystallizes in the P2_1/c space group. This non-interpenetrated 3d framework with the unnamed topology, it contains one type of inorganic building block, 2 types of organic building blocks, 8 free molecules (O) and 4 coordinated molecules (C3H7NO). For 4 building blocks 1 (Y): Y(1) is bonded in a 1-coordinate geometry to  atoms. For 2 building blocks 2 (C6H4O2): There are three inequivalent C sites. In the first C site, C(1) is bonded in a 1-coordinate geometry to one C(2) and one H(1) atom. The C(1)-C(2) bond length is 1.39 Å. The C(1)-H(1) bond length is 0.93 Å. In the second C site, C(2) is bonded in a bent 120 degrees geometry to one C(1) and one C(3) atom. The C(2)-C(3) bond length is 1.41 Å. In the third C site, C(3) is bonded in a distorted single-bond geometry to one C(2) and one O(1) atom. The C(3)-O(1) bond length is 1.35 Å. There are two inequivalent H sites. In the first H site, H(1) is bonded in a single-bond geometry to one C(1) atom. In the second H site, H(2) is bonded in a single-bond geometry to one O(1) atom. The H(2)-O(1) bond length is 0.82 Å. O(1) is bonded in a water-like geometry to one C(3) and one H(2) atom. For 2 building blocks 3 (C6H2O2): There are three inequivalent C sites. In the first C site, C(1) is bonded in a bent 120 degrees geometry to one C(2) and one C(3) atom. The C(1)-C(2) bond length is 1.43 Å. The C(1)-C(3) bond length is 1.38 Å. In the second C site, C(2) is bonded in a distorted single-bond geometry to one C(1), one C(3), and one O(1) atom. The C(2)-C(3) bond length is 1.40 Å. The C(2)-O(1) bond length is 1.34 Å. In the third C site, C(3) is bonded in a distorted bent 120 degrees geometry to one C(1), one C(2), and one H(1) atom. The C(3)-H(1) bond length is 0.93 Å. H(1) is bonded in a single-bond geometry to one C(3) atom. O(1) is bonded in a single-bond geometry to one C(2) atom. The partial atomic charge ranges for C, H, N, O, Y are -0.34 to 0.65, 0.11 to 0.36, 0.06, -0.66 to 0.14, 1.79.
